name: Dorner Blocc Criminal Moreno Valley
description: The Edgemont Dorner Blocc Criminal Gang (DBCG) also known as the Dorner Blocc Criminals (EDBC). Which consist of three individual gangs, known as the Dorner blocc Crips (DBC), Edgemont Criminals Gang (ECG) and the Young Paper Chasers (YPC) who emerged as one powerhouse criminal gang in the Moreno Valley, region of Riverside County of California.

sources.title: Dorner Blocc Criminal Moreno Valley — Wikipedia
